production_cost.note: isolated DR drill in local tmp/in-memory; no live rollback, no production side effects

activity.human_maintenance: DR drill tool (6 components) + verifier + 2 load-bearing negative controls + evidence + adversarial review

value_metric.delivered: every production component (Worker/D1/R2/Registry/content/prediction) is provably recoverable to a consistent known point in isolation, with 0 release blockers and RTO/RPO actuals -- a disaster-recovery safety net gating release
value_metric.release_gate: any non-recoverable component is a release blocker (drill found none)
